headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -45.0)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 242% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 128 quotes despite dropping from yesterday's peak, with an overwhelming 108 strong-intensity comments driving continued high anger levels.

• At 63.4, frustration remains well above the typical range and near the upper end of the 86-day scale.

• Optimism recovered significantly from yesterday's low but stays in negative territory, while fears dropped further below average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
